SaveDraftErrors.DraftsDisabledDueToIssue: Offline Edit has been disabled due to an issue with your device. Contact Support for help.
SaveDraftErrors.Generic: There was an error saving your pending change. Please try again or contact Salesforce for help.
SaveDraftErrors.DeleteEditDraft: You can't delete this record while create or edit is pending.
SaveDraftErrors.PendingSync: Offline records can't be edited while your device is syncing to Salesforce.
SaveDraftErrors.DeleteIrreconcilableDraft: You can't delete this record while an unresolvable error is present.
SaveDraftErrors.NoDraftLookupToDraftId: You can't save this record with a reference to a record created offline.
SaveDraftErrors.DifferentActionThanDraft: You've already edited this record using a different action. To save this record, make the changes again with the first action.
SaveDraftErrors.EditDeleteDraft: You can't edit this record while deletion is pending.

Exception.NoAccessException_desc: You do not have the level of access necessary to perform the operation you requested. Please contact the owner of the record or your administrator if access is necessary.

LightningErrorMessage.validityStepMismatch: Your entry isn't a valid increment.
LightningErrorMessage.validityTypeMismatch: You have entered an invalid format.
LightningErrorMessage.validityBadEmailInput: Enter a valid email address, such as name@email.com.
LightningErrorMessage.validitySelectAtleastOne: You must select at least one choice from this set.

LightningCombobox.deselectOptionKeyboard: Press delete or backspace to remove

Errors.NoRecordDataFound: We couldn't find the record you're trying to access. It may have been deleted by another user, or there may have been a system error. Ask your administrator for help.

ForceRecord.RecordDataCannotUseEntity: This entity is not currently supported by force:recordData.
ForceRecord.invalidRecordLibraryUse: This application contains a reference to the force:record component, which is not supported by this application.

LightningColorPicker.colorPickerInstructions: Use arrow keys to select a saturation and brightness, on an x and y axis.

LightningDateTimePicker.invalidDate: Your entry does not match the allowed format {0}.
